plan: Capped renderer command-log retention at the latest 200 entries through a shared append helper and memoized CommandPanel output formatting so unrelated renders do not rebuild the full log. Added a focused renderer regression test that streams 205 events and asserts older entries are trimmed while recent entries remain. Validation was blocked by missing dependencies in this worktree: Vitest could not resolve `vitest`, and typecheck could not resolve `@types/node` or `vitest/globals`. `git diff --check` passed.
